label: Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules

node.label: Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules
node.definition: Curriculum and mixture schedules control which examples, domains, difficulties, or modalities are sampled at each phase of training.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules is modeled as depending on Active learning & curriculum learning, Data collection, curation & filtering and feeding downstream nodes such as Domain randomization & simulation curricula.

limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Active learning & curriculum learning, Data collection, curation & filtering.
